description: Add runtime/-anchored ignore patterns for grounding-pack.json, prd-draft.json, and grill-decisions.log to the Template gitignore and mirror to the dogfood root; sweep the stamp classification and the package-qa rubric to encode the widened contract in the same change (ADR-0005/0008).
title: Widen the gitignore contract for pre-warm Runtime Records and sweep the stamp rubric
acceptance_criteria: src/template/.excn/gitignore ignores the three pre-warm filenames via runtime/-anchored patterns, byte-identical in the root mirror
git check-ignore reports each pre-warm file ignored in both src/template and the dogfood root
A fresh stamp carries the widened gitignore; the version-controlled work-tracking set is unchanged
package-qa runs green against the new contract with no stale-rubric FAIL
